posts.author: Rishab_Agarwal
posts.community: Delta Corp - A huge but risky opportunity
posts.text: There are lot of companies which are far better than delta corp atleast we should try to see companies where the tailwind is large and headwinds are less, some themes which I am looking is recycling,ship building, power sector, pharma ,valuations may be aggresive but it is worth it to study , cases has been pending from a long time, better to start looking somewhere else
